items.title: PostgreSQL 19 Beta 2 released 2026-07-16
Upstream MySQL out-of-cycle fix for two high-severity CVEs (Oracle June 2026 CPU); in Percona Server 8.4.10-10 (2026-07-01)
pgAdmin 4 9.16 patches 7 CVEs incl. CVE-2026-12045 AI-Assistant RCE (2026-06-18)
Percona Distribution for PostgreSQL 18.4.2/17.10.2 + pg_tde 2.2.1 (2026-07-06)
TiDB 8.5.7 LTS patch released 2026-07-09
Turso 0.7 (Rust SQLite rewrite) drops beta warning, 2026-07-13
pg_textsearch BM25 full-text extension open-sourced under Postgres license (Tiger Data), production-ready PG17/18
PlanetScale ships VTTablet/MySQL dashboard settings, Vitess vindex Query Insights, Postgres web console (Jun-Jul 2026)
Azure HorizonDB distributed Postgres expands public preview (128TB, 3072 vCores, Aurora/AlloyDB rival)
PostgreSQL 14 EOL deadline 2026-11-12

~13 MongoDB server CVEs patched in June 16 point releases (8.3.4/8.2.11/8.0.26/7.0.37/6.0.29/5.0.34); notable CVE-2026-11933 (8.8 post-auth UAF in SSJS) and CVE-2026-9740 (8.7 pre-auth stack overflow in BSONColumn); no known exploitation
Log/info-leak CVEs in same batch: CVE-2026-9735 (6.8 keyfile in logs, 8.3.x) and CVE-2026-9751 (6.8 sensitive data in mongod.log), fixed in June point releases
Atlas native reranking $rerank in public preview and voyage-context-4 GA (July 1, 2026), Atlas-only
Atlas collection- and database-level restores now GA, plus org-level Operations Contact setting (mid-July 2026)
mongosh 2.9.2 (July 1, 2026) adds Session.bulkWrite(); 2.9.0/2.9.1 skipped over publishing issues; fixes ObjectId uniqueness bug
MongoDB 8.2 rapid release reaches end of support July 31, 2026; move to 8.3 rapid or 8.0 LTS
Apache Polaris 1.6.0 released with leaner credential vending, delegation extended to Delta/Hudi/Paimon
Parquet File logical type ratified; 1.18.0 release process starting
Flink equality-delete to deletion-vector conversion completed, wired into IcebergSink
Iceberg Rust 0.10.0 grinding through RCs; gates pyiceberg-core
Apache Arrow 25.0.0 RC and Arrow Rust 59.1.0 released
Apache Iceberg Terraform Provider v0.1.0 RC0/RC1
Debezium Platform mid-year update: AI chatbot still in progress
Oracle CPU July 2026 (release Jul 21): Database Server 16 fixes, 7 remote-no-auth, top CVSS 9.9; affects 19.3-19.31, 21.3-21.22, 23.4.0-23.26.2
GoldenGate July 2026 CPU: 27 new fixes, 9 remote-no-auth, top CVSS 9.1
TimesTen In-Memory July 2026 CPU: 14 fixes, top CVSS 9.9 (4 remote-no-auth); NoSQL 1 (7.3), APEX 3 (5.5)
RUs 19.32 and 23.26.3 available Jul 21, 2026 - Oracle urges immediate apply (critical/high security fixes)
Autonomous Serverless (Jul 2026): Select AI agent teams exposed via A2A protocol; APEX 26.1; external auth for Database Tools (no DB passwords)
Autonomous Serverless (Jun 2026): Deep Data Security fine-grained row/column access; ADB Serverless on Oracle AI Database@AWS
Autonomous Dedicated (Jun 2026): X11MV Exadata systems; force-restart controls for ADB/ACDB/ORDS; AWS KMS CMK with cross-region Data Guard
Performance: Database In-Memory now available on Autonomous Database Serverless
GoldenGate 26ai: Automatic Schema Evolution preview, unified console, inline AI transform microservice, Air-Gap replication, YugabyteDB/EDB Postgres capture
Exadata System Software recommended level 25.2.11.0.0 (Jun 16); 26ai release 26.1 out with RDMA VM live migration
Adaptive Compute is GA on AWS (6 regions), ~1.2x price/perf vs Gen2 Standard
2026_05 behavior-change bundle enables by default in July; Managed Iceberg tables replicate by default
CREATE OR ALTER is GA for 24 object types
VOLATILE scalar UDFs now supported in Dynamic Table incremental refresh (GA)
Snowpipe Streaming classic architecture deprecation announcement expected mid-2026 (18-month sunset)
Analytical search (Public Preview) orchestrates multi-index Cortex Search with AISQL
Per-user compute quotas (Preview) in release 10.24
Online Feature Store (Public Preview) for Snowpark ML
No new Snowflake CVEs in-window (latest CVE-2026-6442 from April 2026)
Scala and Java UDFs in Unity Catalog are GA
Parquet v2 for Delta tables is GA (DBR 18.1+)
Genie moves to pay-as-you-go DBU billing
REPLACE WHERE flows GA
FLOW AUTO CDC for streaming tables in DBSQL is GA
Lakehouse Real-Time (Lakehouse//RT) serverless SQL warehouse Beta
Secrets in Unity Catalog (Public Preview)
Convert partitioned Delta table to Liquid Clustering is GA
Trigger.AvailableNow for OpenSharing streaming GA (behavior change)
AI Search (formerly Vector Search) High QPS GA
ai_query / ai_extract / ai_classify AI Functions GA
Budgets GA incl. Unity AI Gateway cost controls
Standard performance mode for MV/streaming refreshes in jobs (DBU savings)
Lakeflow Connect row filtering GA
Lakebase adds Postgres 18 and SOC 2 Type 2
Gemini 2.5 Flash (Oct 2) and Claude Sonnet 4 (Oct 9) scheduled for retirement
Legacy system.compute_preview schema deprecated
CVE-2026-33107 Azure Databricks SSRF priv-esc (pre-window, CVSS 10.0, platform-fixed)
DBR 19 Beta and shift to weekly dated updates per major release
Project caps (scheduling policies) let you cap slots/concurrency per project within a reservation (Preview)
Iceberg managed tables: partitioning, multi-statement transactions, advanced runtime now GA
Autonomous embedding generation GA: self-maintaining embedding columns via CREATE/ALTER TABLE
Gemini Cloud Assist query optimization recommendations, editions-only (Preview)
Hybrid semantic+keyword search and single-vector syntax for VECTOR_SEARCH (Preview)
Vectorized Python UDFs with Arrow RecordBatch, Cloud Monitoring metrics, container_request_concurrency (Preview)
Multi-level aggregation in GoogleSQL: aggregates as arguments to aggregates (Preview)
Continuous queries to stream BigQuery data into Spanner now GA
Cross-region replication latency/egress monitoring and multi-region sharing listings GA
Legacy SQL use restricted effective June 1, 2026 based on prior usage
On-demand daily query default cap of 200 TiB; previously-unlimited projects get custom caps
Facebook Ads transfer: ActionValue INT->FLOAT from July 25, 2026; AdInsightsMMM temporarily disabled
Daily token quota config for gen-AI functions temporarily disabled
Patch 203 / cluster version 1.0.347559 (CURRENT track): faster ANALYZE, auto-DISTKEY for PK tables, account lockout, SHOW GRANTS FOR GROUP
Zero-ETL observability improvements in Patch 203 (per-checkpoint status, UTF-8 handling, DynamoDB time-travel timestamps)
Snapshot restore now preserves zero-ETL and S3 event integrations (Patch 202)
Graviton RG instances now available in AWS GovCloud (US-East and US-West)
Python UDF end of support deadline passed June 30, 2026; migrate to Lambda UDFs
CVE-2026-8178: Redshift JDBC driver RCE (CVSS 9.2), fixed in 2.2.2; verify driver version
Synapse private-link / trusted-services firewall retirement (postponed to 1 Jun 2027; audit network path now)
OneLake Security & Data Access Roles GA, being enabled by default
Mirroring GA: SQL Server, Azure Postgres, Cosmos DB + Snowflake updates (private-link supported)
Diagnose Lakehouse/Warehouse table health in T-SQL (sys.sp_get_table_health_metrics) GA
Data Warehouse Monitor + SQL endpoint CI/CD, ALTER COLUMN, time travel (Preview)
GPU-accelerated Fabric Warehouse (early-access Preview)
Capacity Metrics app enhancements + Chargeback app GA; overage 3x PAYG
Fabric Planning GA (July 2026) with role/session + job-based billing (Preview)
Data agents in Microsoft 365 Copilot GA; AI Functions default to gpt-5-mini
Chris Webb: Operations Agents + Workspace Monitoring for Power BI
Apache Doris: critical unauthenticated FE HTTP admin API (CVE-2026-58319), upgrade to 3.1.0+
Trino: Iceberg REST catalog credential disclosure (CVE-2026-34214, CVSS 7.7), fixed in 480
StarRocks: HIGH ZooKeeper-dependency CVEs (CVE-2026-24281/24308)
ClickHouse 26.6 (OSS): multi-stage distributed execution, continuous streaming queries, hypothetical skip indexes, cascading refreshable MVs
ClickHouse Cloud: Claude-powered ClickHouse Agents beta and managed Postgres-on-NVMe with CDC into ClickHouse
Apache Doris 4.1 (OSS): search() BM25, IVF vector indexes, full Iceberg V3 read+write, 100MB JSON (vendor benchmarks)
Trino 482 (OSS): new SQL predicates/named args, Iceberg Parquet footer caching; breaking char/varchar coercion + Alluxio removal
StarTree MCP Server for Apache Pinot: natural-language AI-agent interface over real-time Pinot
MotherDuck: writes to Databricks-managed Iceberg tables, Flights on Free/Lite; DuckDB 1.5.3
Teradata VantageCloud: GPU-accelerated compute and BYO-LLM for VantageCloud Lake, expanded cloud partnerships
SingleStore Flow (K8s operator) 4.176.0 released
AMD confirms EPYC Venice (Zen 6) launch for July 22-23: 256 cores, 16-channel DDR5, PCIe Gen6
Server DRAM prices doubled-plus with 30-40-week lead times; max out RAM-per-socket at purchase
SK Hynix drops contract price cap; Micron locks 5-year highs
NAND contract prices up 70-75% QoQ in Q2 2026; enterprise SSD now #1 NAND segment

Fresh audited TPC-H results posted (Dell, Alibaba Cloud, HPE)

OTel GenAI conventions maturing; Langfuse v4 goes OTel-native
Reranker-first RAG pipelines still win

TypeScript 7.0 GA — the Go-native compiler
Astro 7.0
Vitest 4.1
field-sizing reaches Baseline Newly available

containerd critical CRI/checkpoint CVEs — patch to 2.3.2 / 2.2.5 / 2.1.9

FinOps signal: prod K8s CPU utilization still ~8%
OpenTofu 1.12.x vs Terraform 1.14 divergence widens
Pulumi CLI/SDK June rollup (Jun 24, 2026)
OpenTelemetry Collector v0.156.0 (Jul 8, 2026)

K8s 1.35 removed cgroup v1 entirely; IPVS deprecated
Google Play target API deadline Aug 31, 2026: existing apps must target Android 15 (API 35), new apps/updates Android 16 (API 36); extension to Nov 1
Android Security Bulletin July 2026 (patch level 2026-07-05) fixes critical Framework/System CVEs
iOS 26.5.2 fixes 30+ flaws incl WebKit sandbox escapes (CVE-2026-43725, CVE-2026-43701), Canvas UAF (CVE-2026-43720), kernel (CVE-2026-43724)
Apple tightens App Review Guidelines (June 8, 2026): 4.3 spam rule pulls low-effort apps; new Live Activities and AI/framework rules
Kotlin 2.4.0 released (June 2026): stable context parameters/backing fields, collection literals, Swift packages as deps; K1 and language-version 1.9 removed
Xcode 26.6 RC ships Swift 6.3, iOS 26.5 SDKs, Gemini coding agent; requires macOS Tahoe 26.2+
Expo SDK 55 / React Native 0.83: New Architecture always on, Hermes v1 opt-in; RN 0.81/SDK 54 last legacy-arch versions
Flutter 3.44.6 stable hotfix (July 9, 2026) with Dart 3.12.2
AGP 9 enables built-in Kotlin by default; AGP 10 (H2 2026) removes legacy variant APIs; Compose 1.12 needs compileSdk 37
Apple opens Foundation Models to third-party adapters (iOS 27, LanguageModel protocol); Gemini in framework; Android ML Kit GenAI on Gemini Nano
Google Play 16 KB page-size requirement now enforced for app updates (deadline was May 1, 2026)

Hugging Face breach run end-to-end by an autonomous AI agent (~17k actions; internal datasets + service credentials accessed); users urged to rotate tokens; HF used Z.ai GLM 5.2 for forensics after Western models refused
GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra found a pre-auth WordPress SQLi (escalatable to admin) for ~$25 vs ~$500k broker payout (Searchlight Cyber); tied to wp2shell WordPress core RCE, CVE-2026-63030
Axios: White House moving to restrict US access to Chinese open-weight models (Kimi/DeepSeek/GLM) via procurement rules and Entity List threats after Kimi K3 surge
Kimi K3 (Moonshot, 2.8T MoE, 1M ctx, ~$3/$15) adds Standard/High/Max reasoning tiers; switching mid-session invalidates context cache; open weights promised Jul 27
Google Gemini 3.5 Pro reportedly delayed again after falling short on coding and long-horizon reasoning; no model card as of mid-July (rumored 2M ctx, $15/$60)
arXiv 'Loopie' weight-sharing MoE preprint claims 6B/20B looped transformers at IMO/IPhO gold-level reasoning; single-source, unreplicated
Thinking Machines (Mira Murati) shipped Inkling, ~975B open-weight frontier-style model with downloadable weights + hosted API (~Jul 15)
